## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes (all unit tests green)
- [ ] No new unhandled errors
- [ ] Audit event added for any new state-changing route
- [ ] Metric counter/histogram added for any new operation
- [ ] OpenAPI spec updated (`docs/openapi.yaml`)
- [ ] Runbook updated if operational behaviour changed
